summary: Iteration 42 - Backend testing for login bug fix (empty email → Pydantic EmailStr validation). All 7 tests passed: phone-based login, email-based login (regression), check-member-phone, check-agent-phone, member activation flow, and invalid credentials handling.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: clean_empty_email pre-validator in auth_models.py (line 30-35) correctly converts empty string emails to None before EmailStr validation
VERIFIED: Phone-based login for +2250709005301 returns 200 with user.email=null (not empty string)
VERIFIED: Email-based login for klenakan.eric@gmail.com returns 200 (regression test passed)
VERIFIED: check-member-phone endpoint returns can_activate:false, reason:has_account for already-activated member +2250707001001
VERIFIED: check-agent-phone endpoint returns can_activate:false, reason:has_account for already-activated agent +2250709005301
VERIFIED: Login with activated member account +2250707001001 succeeds with status 200
VERIFIED: Invalid credentials correctly return 401 (wrong password, non-existent user)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified the main bug fix: phone-based accounts with empty email strings now work correctly. The clean_empty_email pre-validator in auth_models.py UserBase class converts '' to None before Pydantic EmailStr validation. All activation flow endpoints tested: /api/auth/login (phone & email), /api/auth/check-member-phone, /api/auth/check-agent-phone. The member +2250707001001 (Tra Bi Emmanuel) was already activated in a previous test run. All 8 agents are activated and have accounts.
